clone_procedure.hexa_additions: pip install pydantic==2.* biopython==1.84 biotite==1.0.* rdkit-pypi==2024.3.*

steps: STEP 1: pre-flight nvidia-smi (idle <200 MB; 12288 MB total; driver >=550)
STEP 2: curl PDB 6L1U FASTA + reference structure
STEP 3: precompute MSA alignments (or use --use_single_seq_inference for fast smoke)
STEP 4: launch nvidia-smi poller @ 500ms cadence (-lms 500) in background
STEP 5: forward pass via run_pretrained_openfold.py with --bf16 --model_device cuda:0
STEP 6: kill poller, awk peak_vram_mb from CSV
STEP 7: BioPython parse output PDB; verify residue count matches input
STEP 9: write verifier.json with case_id, model_pin SHA40, peak_vram_mb, rmsd_angstrom, inference_time_sec, verdict
vram_measurement_procedure.polling_rationale: OpenFold attention has sub-second peak spikes; 500ms catches them without CUDA stream interference
fallback_chain: 7f: bf16 → fp16 (slight accuracy loss, large memory drop)
7g: declare F-W1-1 + F-W3-4 falsified → escalate to RoseTTAFold All-Atom
vram_measurement_procedure.execution_status: NOT_EXECUTED — requires user approval; sandbox cannot SSH ubu1

multi_strand_insertion_points.insertion_strategy: late-fusion: cross-attn modules attach AFTER each of evoformer blocks 43..48 (last 6 of 48); RNA + ligand encoders run independently; joint structure module at end
rationale: first 42 blocks preserve protein-only representation quality
block boundaries expose pair tensor (B, N_res, N_res, 128) without shape adapter
late injection means RNA/ligand encoders see stable protein gradients (training stability)

openfold_api_surface_required.invasiveness: non-invasive if forward() exposes start_block/end_block kwarg; runtime monkey-patch otherwise

openfold_api_surface_required.surface: Pair embedding (B, N_res, N_res, 128) accessible at block boundary
StructureModule.forward(pair, msa, ...) extension to accept r_emb + l_emb queries
openfold_api_surface_required.invasiveness: necessarily invasive (subclass + override; bounded — no source patches)

raw_91_c3_limits: module-layout assumption based on AF2 lineage canonical form; not source-tree-verified (F-W3-1, F-W3-5)
EvoformerStack block-range API existence assumed; runtime monkey-patch is bounded fallback
LoC margin is zero — no slack for unexpected boilerplate

rows.mitigation: fall back to OpenFold main HEAD if v2.2.0 pins torch<2.0

rows.openfold_v220: compiles cuda kernels; sm_120 may be missing from prebuilt

critical_conflicts: sm_120 (RTX 5070 compute capability 12.0) absent from OpenFold prebuilt cuda kernels
torch 2.5 may exceed OpenFold v2.2.0 upper bound (forces main HEAD pin or torch downgrade)
dependency_conflict_matrix.resolution_decision_tree: torch 2.5 incompatible? → main HEAD ; sm_120 fails compile? → PTX JIT ; numpy ABI mis? → hard-pin <2.0

hooks_with_invasive_fallback: N6-H2 (only invasive if pair-track read needed)
